rationale: Yoon et al. (2009) is used in the methods section to justify that the fMRI sample size follows recommended practice, which is a concrete methodological role. The citing paper also references it in the discussion to support caution about fMRI interpretation (e.g., limits of inference and reverse-inference concerns). These are specific uses tied to design and interpretation, not just a passing background mention. The citation therefore functions as applied methodological guidance.
relation_description: The citing paper applies methodological guidance from Yoon et al. (2009) to its own fMRI marketing study, especially for sample-size justification and interpretation cautions. It uses that prior work to frame how neural findings should be reported and bounded.
